x-enumeration-literals.name: Transaction-Based Accrual
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Cashback is calculated and recorded for each individual eligible transaction.

Comment:
Example: 2% cashback is accrued immediately after every purchase.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Daily Accrual
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Cashback is summed up and recorded once per day based on all eligible transactions that occurred that day.

Comment:
Example: All grocery purchases of the day are totalled and cashback is applied once daily.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Billing Cycle Accrual
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Cashback is accumulated over a billing period (e.g., monthly statement cycle) and calculated at the end of the cycle.

Comment:
Example: All eligible card spending in a month earns cashback, credited after statement closing.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Event-Based Accrual
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Cashback is accrued when a specific event occurs, not necessarily tied to transactions.

Comment:
Example: Cashback is accrued when a customer reaches €500 cumulative spend.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Threshold-Based Accrual
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Cashback starts accruing only after a minimum spending threshold is met.

Comment:
Example: 5% cashback applies only after spending exceeds €100.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Batch Accrual
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Cashback is calculated and accumulated in scheduled processing batches (e.g., end-of-day or end-of-week processing runs).

Comment:
Example: Bank processes all cashback calculations every Sunday night.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Real-Time Accrual
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Cashback is calculated and updated instantly at the time of transaction authorization or posting.

Comment:
Example: Cashback balance updates immediately after card swipe approval.
